front: Describe the role of adjuvants in enhancing vaccine responses.
back: Adjuvants enhance antigen immunogenicity.铝盐 (alum) promotes Th2 responses. AS01 (MPL + QS-21) for shingles vaccine. MF59 (squalene emulsion) for influenza. CpG (TLR9 agonist) for hepatitis B. TLR agonists bridge innate and adaptive immunity.
